ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victoria Li specially appearing for Attorney Cindy Yau for Paul Dowling.

Ms. Li stated that the Administrator was still trying to obtain statements back to the date of death, that the financial institutions were not cooperating, that the Administrator hired Probate Paralegal Rebecca Hills to assist with the accounting and requested a 6 week continuance to file the amended accounting petition. The matter was continued to November 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear and show why they should not be sanctioned for failure to appear and for failure to file the Petition for Final Distribution. The return date is July 14, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Upon further review, the Court found that the Petition for Final Distribution has been filed with a hearing date of July 20, 2010. The Order to Show Cause will not be issued and this matter is taken off calendar.
